emerging_themes: permanent-vs-disposable instruments: the pipeline needs classification of which tools persist and which become irrelevant
fiction-as-fuel: historical parallels and stories generate more productive friction than research synthesis
consensus-as-terminal-state: agreement is where threads go to die — the Measurement Attractor persists
genre confusion as structural feature: forensic mode dominates because it requires no accountability
